info.title: Nupeek.Cli
info.description: Targeted NuGet decompilation for coding agents.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription:
Nupeek: targeted NuGet decompilation for coding agents.

Command options:
  type: (--package|-p <id> | --assembly <dll>) --type --out [--depth N] [--version] [--tfm]
  find: (--package|-p <id> | --assembly <dll>) --symbol --out [--version] [--tfm]
  list: (--package|-p <id> | --assembly <dll>) [--version] [--tfm] [--query text]
  graph: --assembly <dll> --out <dir> [--type <Namespace.Type>] [--depth N]

Tip:
  Run 'nupeek <command> --help' to see full per-command options.

Examples:
  nupeek type --package Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus --type Azure.Messaging.ServiceBus.ServiceBusSender --out deps-src
  nupeek type --package Humanizer.Core --version 2.14.1 --tfm netstandard2.0 --type Humanizer.StringHumanizeExtensions --out deps-src
  nupeek type --package Polly --type Polly.Policy --out deps-src
  nupeek find --package Polly --symbol Polly.Policy.Handle --out deps-src
  nupeek find --package Dapper --symbol Dapper.SqlMapper.Query --out deps-src --progress never
  nupeek type --assembly ./bin/Debug/net8.0/MyApp.Services.dll --type MyApp.Services.RetryHelper --out deps-src
  nupeek list --assembly ./bin/Debug/net8.0/MyApp.Services.dll --query Retry
  nupeek graph --assembly ./bin/Debug/net8.0/MyApp.Services.dll --type MyApp.Services.RetryHelper --depth 2 --out deps-src
  # Graph files: graph.types.json, graph.members.json, graph.edges.json, graph.globals.json

commands.name: type
commands.description: Decompile a single type from a NuGet package or local assembly.

commands.name: find
commands.description: Resolve symbol to type and decompile that type.

commands.name: list
commands.description: List available types from package or assembly.

commands.name: graph
commands.description: Export structural internals graph (types, members, edges, globals). Provider-only output.
